title: Align in Arlington Webinar - February - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Align in Arlington Webinar - February - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Events
« All Events
Align in Arlington Webinar – February
February 27
@
12:00 pm
–
1:00 pm
EST
Are you interested in tech but don’t have a tech background? This information session will show you how to bridge the gap for people without a tech background to earn a master’s degree, in as little as 2.5 years, and enter the tech industry successfully.
Who should attend
Professionals from non-tech fields considering a career switch.
Students from non-computer science disciplines.
Anyone interested in learning about alternative pathways into the tech industry.
Our students come from a variety of backgrounds—with undergraduate majors ranging from math and biology to history and journalism. During this session we will cover the key topics.
The
Align Master’s Program
:
Northeastern’s #1 ranked co-op program
